description.ko: AQUA-5는 극한의 대기압을 견디도록 설계된 최첨단 심해 잠수정으로, 미지의 심해 지역을 탐사하기 위한 고급 생체 발광 센서와 강화 티타늄 외피를 갖추고 있습니다.
description.en: The AQUA-5 is a state-of-the-art deep-sea submersible designed for extreme atmospheric pressure, equipped with advanced bioluminescent sensors and a reinforced titanium shell for exploring the uncharted depths of the midnight zone.

prompt: A futuristic deep-sea exploration vessel named AQUA-5, featuring a sleek aerodynamic titanium hull with glowing neon cyan bioluminescent lights, navigating through a dark underwater abyss filled with hydrothermal vents and bioluminescent jellyfish, cinematic lighting, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, shot with a macro lens
